evidence: Amazon publicly announced Madison County MS campus in late January 2024 (legislation approval); broke ground May 20 2024 per Site Selection Magazine; both Canton 1 and Ridgeland 1 are phases of this single campus announcement.
Same January 2024 campus-level announcement as Canton 1; Ridgeland 1 is a second building on the Madison County mega-site campus approved by Mississippi legislature in January 2024.

DCD Dec 22 2021 first public identification of Patrinely/Corscale as developer of 300MW Gainesville Crossing campus on I-66 in PWC; site purchased Aug 2020 but developer not publicly disclosed until Dec 2021; Building 1 capacity advertised for Summer 2022 availability.

column9: Yondr Group press release June 2 2021 announced acquisition of 270 acres across Prince William and Loudoun Counties with JKLH to deliver 500MW capacity; Bristow 2 is a later building on the Bristow campus first announced in this June 2021 land acquisition.

evidence: Google's own location page states the Douglas County facility was built and opened in 2003 and was among first adopters of recycled industrial water cooling; Google has committed more than $3B in Georgia since the 2003 facility.

Google confirmed New Albany Ohio campus in January 2019 as part of Sundar Pichai's $13B US investment announcement; New Albany Company CEO confirmed $600M facility; New Albany 7a (Licking County) is a later expansion building on the same campus established in 2019.

Same January 2019 Google New Albany Ohio campus announcement; New Albany 6a (Franklin County) is a later phase of the same multi-building campus; no separate announcement found for this specific building.

S&P Global Intelligence reported Feb 3 2022 that Mawson Infrastructure planned 100MW Bitcoin mining facility in Midland PA; Beaver County Times followed Feb 9 2022; GEM wiki confirms construction completion targeted June 2022 for full capacity.

Northern Data Group's Peak Mining purchased first 300MW site in Corpus Christi in December 2023 (referenced in May 24 2024 announcement of second site purchase); second adjacent 300MW site announced May 2024; S&P op year 2024 matches the first site.

Wattum announced expansion to Niagara Falls Dec 23 2021; GEM wiki notes USBTC likely acquired project in late 2019 or early 2021 from Wattum; Hut 8 inherited via Nov 2023 USBTC merger; earliest credible public date is Wattum Dec 2021 announcement.

Applied Blockchain (later Applied Digital) started construction of Garden City campus in late April 2022 per its own press release; facility energized in 2023; Marathon (MARA) announced acquisition Mar 15 2024 and closed Apr 2 2024.

Compute North broke ground Apr 12 2022 (DCD) on 300MW facility at Wolf Hollow Generating Station in Granbury (Hood County); Compute North entered bankruptcy Sep 2022; Generate Capital acquired; MARA acquired from Generate Capital in 2023 for $178.6M; city field McCamey in S&P appears to be an error -- facility is Granbury Hood County.
